component.name: Fauxx Desktop Companion
component.summary: Generate realistic decoy web activity to pollute data-broker profiles

description.p: Fauxx Desktop Companion is a privacy command center for the desktop: it generates realistic decoy web activity through synthetic personas to pollute the profiles that data brokers and ad-tech build about you. It is the cross-device companion to the Fauxx Android app, sharing the same persona model so a household can present one coherent, deliberately misleading picture across phone and desktop.
It is decoy-only and local-first by design: it never touches your real accounts, never logs in anywhere, sends no telemetry, and keeps all state in an encrypted store on your own machine.

ul.li: Coherent synthetic personas drawn from a real US Census ACS-PUMS distribution.
A real-browser decoy that drives a dedicated, isolated Chromium profile over the DevTools Protocol.
Cross-device coordination: pair with the phone over the LAN to run or rotate the same persona.
Per-persona egress (proxy, Tor, VPN) and DNS strategy, fail-closed so it never falls back to your real IP.
Measurement: KL-divergence and per-category drift, plus CSV/JSON/PDF efficacy snapshots.

description.p: The real-browser decoy uses your system-installed Chromium at run time.
Adds a stable per-persona desktop device identity (user-agent and client hints) for the decoy browser.
